{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323015831CA32015AEA9533256EB8"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7564007901858693912","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"兄弟们有什么建议可以告诉我，我会倾听兄弟们的意见"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761134847,"group_id":"7562602257141730366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看不见摸不着的才是真相","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwB4TZlTmXORhLcuES+G3eY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8b420141034c4da9bfbbfffce5ff1368~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791155&x-signature=UCXhTdQdtg0NzoLgb%2FzhDv%2Buv30%3D","user_id":"387507296941448","user_name":"罪人柒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"387507296941448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7562602257141730366","book_info":{"abstract":"世界设定：灰雾笼罩的生存游戏

公元2077年，一场无预兆的“灰雾降临”将全人类意识拉入名为“灰境行者”的规则世界。现实维度与克苏鲁异次元的夹缝成为战场，玩家需以“摸金”为核心获取资源——探索深埋地下的古神遗迹、破解超自然机关、掠夺蕴含混沌能量的“旧日秘宝”，同时抵御畸变的“深潜者”、“修格斯”等克苏鲁生物。

世界规则残酷且公平：每次探索失败会随机剥夺一项能力，累计三次失败则意识被灰雾吞噬（现实中变为植物人）；而成功掠夺秘宝可解锁“神性碎片”，觉醒操控阴影、硬化皮肤等超能力，最终目标是抵达“灰境核心”，成为世界规则的掌控者。
